km.Pandy, Monmouthshire, Wales: ផានឌី, ម៉ូនម៉ូuthស៊ីរe, វ៉ាឡិស

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge於大約1227年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾潘迪。她於大約1247年與Richard Pembridge在威爾士蒙姆爾潘迪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge于大约1227年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾潘迪。她于大约1247年与Richard Pembridge在威尔士蒙姆爾潘迪结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge was born about 1227, in Pandy, Monmouthshire, Wales. She married Richard Pembridge about 1247, in Pandy, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge est née environ 1227, à Pandy, Monmouthshire, Galles. Elle a épousé Richard Pembridge environ 1247, à Pandy, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge wurde um 1227 in Pandy, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren. Sie hat um 1247 in Pandy, Monmouthshire, Wales Richard Pembridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge è nata il circa 1227 nel Pandy, Monmouthshire, Galles. Lei sposato Richard Pembridge circa 1247, nel Pandy, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Pandy, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアプアンディ
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridgeは約1227年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアプアンディで生まれた。約1247年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアプアンディでRichard Pembridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge(은)는 대략 1227년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 파디에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1247년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 파디에서 Richard Pembridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Pandy, Monmouthshire, Gales. Ela casou-se com Richard Pembridge aproximadamente 1247, em Pandy, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge родилась около 1227 г. в местности панди, монмоутшир, Уэльс. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Pembridge около 1247 г. в местности панди, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Pembridge nació aproximadamente 1227, en Pandy, Monmouthshire, Gales. Se casó con Richard Pembridge aproximadamente 1247, en Pandy, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
